scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: This is not a video. I am opening three real users on one live map, then driving reports, responders, alerts, and case state through M Q T T.

scenes.speaker: God Mode
scenes.narration: Now I add disposable witness reports, rain pressure, and A I responder agents. They support the S O S; they are not the emergency trigger.

scenes.speaker: Citizen, Mei Ling
scenes.narration: It is pouring at the M R T exit. An e bike is smoking at the covered choke point and people are crowding under shelter. I am asthmatic, so first I make sure my aid card is set.

scenes.speaker: Responder, Aisha
scenes.narration: I am Aisha, a nearby community responder. I begin in lepak mode: no mission, no private details, and no false urgency until I choose to go on duty.

scenes.speaker: Ops, Nadia
scenes.narration: I am Nadia in ops. I am not here to improvise heroics; I see reports, responders, cases, and map evidence, then decide what to publish and who to send.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Pelita is an A I Kaki agent, not another human role. Mei Ling asks one conditions question, and Pelita reads the same map snapshot already refreshed by the app.

scenes.speaker: Responder, Aisha
scenes.narration: I am nearby, but the system should not page me just because I exist. I go on duty and declare medical plus hazard support.

scenes.speaker: Citizen, Mei Ling
scenes.narration: Now it is an emergency. An elderly man near the smoke has collapsed and is not responding properly. I am the witness, he is the casualty, and this needs a Medical S O S.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Bekal is the S O S companion A I. It does not dispatch anyone. It calls the A E D and hospital skills, then gives Mei Ling specific guidance while responders move.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: The same incident now exists in three maps. Mei Ling sees her S O S. Aisha receives a matched page. Nadia sees smoke reports and the live case forming.

scenes.speaker: Ops, Nadia
scenes.narration: The S O S is already live. The reports are supporting context, so I verify with the map before I broadcast: access, cameras, rain, A E Ds, and emergency hospitals.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Pondok is the ops lookout A I. It reads the roster, cases, reports, and map context, suggests responder fit, and leaves the send decision to Nadia.

scenes.speaker: Responder, Aisha
scenes.narration: Before I join, I see the category and location but not private medical details. Once I commit, the case room opens and the aid card becomes useful.

scenes.speaker: Citizen, Mei Ling
scenes.narration: This is the moment that matters. My map does not merely say help is coming. I can see responders moving toward me and an A E D runner assigned.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Now I break only Aisha's route to M Q T T. The app may keep working locally, but it must not pretend the broker has delivered her arrival.

scenes.speaker: Responder, Aisha
scenes.narration: I mark myself on scene while the connection is down. My phone keeps the retained update queued instead of lying to Mei Ling.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Mei Ling still has not received Aisha's arrival. That restraint is important: no false acknowledgement before M Q T T delivers it.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: The connection returns. M Q T T flushes the queued retained update, and Mei Ling's map reconciles to someone on scene.

scenes.speaker: Ops, Nadia
scenes.narration: Now my job is coordination. Medical goes to the collapsed person, the A E D runner goes to the nearest device, and traffic access checks the road.

scenes.speaker: Ops, Nadia
scenes.narration: The smoke and access risk are verified, so I warn people away from the station exit without exposing the private case room.

scenes.speaker: Citizen, Mei Ling
scenes.narration: The alert tells everyone else what to avoid. In my case room I can see who is here; the A E D is with the elderly man, responders have him, and I am clear of the smoke. So I tap I'm safe.

scenes.speaker: Responder, Aisha
scenes.narration: The citizen's safe button is not enough by itself, and my field confirmation is not enough alone. The case closes only when both facts exist.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Hospitals, A E Ds, traffic, cameras, weather, responders, chat, alerts, and state changes all served one story: map evidence plus M Q T T coordination.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: This performance is complete. I will remove the bots, users, reports, case messages, alerts, presence, and logs created by this session.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Mei Ling signs in as Citizen. The demo waits for each screen and enabled control before moving on.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Aisha signs in as Responder. The demo waits for each screen and enabled control before moving on.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia signs in as Ops. The demo waits for each screen and enabled control before moving on.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Mei Ling marks asthma so smoke guidance can use her actual aid card.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: She also records that she carries an inhaler. Only a responder who joins her S O S can see this.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Aisha marks medical support so the app can match her to a Medical S O S.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: She also marks hazard support because smoke and blocked access affect this response.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Pelita has turned the cached rain, air, and traffic readings into one useful local answer. No extra upstream fetch was needed.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: The map zooms into the actual S O S at Exit B. From this point onward, every hospital, A E D, traffic, camera, and weather check is measured from this incident.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Bekal has returned the nearest A E D, an emergency hospital, and immediate safety guidance. Those skill results are also rendered as map pins.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Aisha opens the matched S O S area first. She checks resources and access around Exit B, not random markers elsewhere in Singapore.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Aisha opens the nearest A E D to the S O S, because she may need to run for the device while another responder starts C P R.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Aisha checks the nearest L T A traffic-incident record to Exit B. Its distance from the S O S is shown before she chooses her approach.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Mei Ling returns to the S O S area. The close map now shows the casualty point and responder approach markers together.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia zooms directly to Exit B. Every public-data popup that follows is the nearest available reading or facility to this S O S.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia opens the nearest L T A traffic-incident record to Exit B and checks its displayed distance from the S O S.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia opens the nearest traffic camera to Exit B. The image is relevant to the incident access route, not a random island-wide camera.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia checks the nearest rainfall station to the S O S because rain pushes people into the covered choke point and slows movement.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia opens the nearest A E D to Exit B to decide who should fetch it instead of duplicating medical support.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia opens the nearest emergency hospital to the S O S, giving the case a concrete escalation point if the casualty worsens.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Pondok has compared the live roster with the case: Aisha fits medical and hazard support, while Wei Jian fits the A E D run. Nadia still decides the deployment.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia opens the blocked-access report and creates a separate investigation instead of confusing it with the medical casualty.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: Nadia targets everyone near Exit B, marks the warning as Emergency, and writes one clear public action: keep the walkway and access road clear.

scenes.speaker: AI Director
scenes.narration: The ops warning has reached Mei Ling. The demo opens her alerts to show the delivered result before closing the case.
